description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious wraparound terrace bordered by a black metal railing. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The terrace features two large patio umbrellas and outdoor seating, suggesting a focus on leisure and outdoor living. The interior is partially visible, revealing green accent walls, potted plants, and minimalist furnishings. The building has a clean, geometric design with straight lines and a functional layout. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a wraparound terrace featuring patio umbrellas and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the bungalow with a prominent terrace area, black metal railing, and a large patio umbrella. The interior green accent wall and plants are visible through the windows.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance, large windows, and two patio umbrellas on the terrace, with outdoor seating clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side view displays the terrace wrapping around the building, a hot tub or circular seating area, and a long green accent wall inside.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a more enclosed side of the bungalow with fewer windows and a glimpse of the interior layout, including shelving and plants.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
